ab: hlimusa ku miararuma takuliliungu tamu hlahlusa kiira
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: rahlua cu a mu kuapakita, tam miatatarʉ a ku isana.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: taratʉahlʉ ku tamu’u hlahlusa, makuakuaisa ihlaku uumu vakatʉ maami , makuakuaisa ihlaku miama sahlumu rahlʉngʉ.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: tam maami a hlilʉmʉkʉ isa tamuhlahlusana vakatʉ maami, tamuucu sa’au.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: marumuku a ku tamuhlahlusa isa sahlumu rahlʉngʉ mʉmʉa. tam mavacangʉ miima.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: marumaru maci mahlipapu, pahlaʉlʉsʉ aku nua tamuahlaina avavu kuamamahlipapu.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: hlivavu cu tamuahlaina tam marivacangʉ, maru vutukuhlu, maru turukuka, maru vusiakʉ, marumana tavuhlinga.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: kualʉpʉngʉ kuamamahlipapu, musa mu tatahlatʉngʉa rumavi hlatʉngʉ.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: umala tamuahlaina matumuhlu mairangʉ, intavangʉ hla takʉcʉngʉ uvura ihlaku, avura ihlaku mahlava puaili salia.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
